name: B-Mods
description: Open-tube chassis modifieds. Loud, light, and built to slide. The headline feature most Fridays.

name: Hobby Stock
description: Full-bodied entry class. Where most Speedrome careers begin — and a few never leave.

name: 4 Cylinder
description: Front-wheel imports and economy steel. Cheapest seat at the dance and twice the door-banging.

name: Super Stock
description: Late-model bodied V8 stockers. The fastest fenders on the property and the closest finishes of the night.
